name: OXE Marine AB (publ)
summary: OXE Marine AB (publ) designs, develops, and distributes diesel outboard engines for the marine market in Sweden and internationally. The company offers OXE Diesel, a diesel outboard engine. It offers its engines for governmental, search and rescue operations, IMO/EPA regulated vessels, oil and gas, tender boats, marine ecotourism, fishing, harbors, and survey vessels applications. The company was formerly known as Cimco Marine AB (publ) and changed its name to OXE Marine AB (publ) in February 2020. OXE Marine AB (publ) was incorporated in 2012 and is headquartered in Helsingborg, Sweden.
